languages.text: {n}Источающие смрадные благовония из технических масел участники процессии кланяются вам. Сверху они напоминают волнующееся озеро из металлических конечностей и {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}мехадендритов{/g}. В самом конце процессии вы замечаете знакомые фигуры медикариев.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Источающие смрадные благовония из технических масел участники процессии кланяются вам. Сверху они напоминают волнующееся озеро из металлических конечностей и {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}механодендритов{/g}. В самом конце процессии вы замечаете знакомые фигуры медикариев.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The members of the procession bow to you, sending heady fumes of machine unguents wafting in your direction. From above, they resemble a rippling lake of metallic limbs and {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g}. At the very tail of the procession, you notice the familiar figures of the medicae officers.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Источающие смрадные благовония из технических масел участники процессии кланяются вам. Сверху они напоминают волнующееся озеро из металлических конечностей и {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}мехадендритов{/g}. В самом конце процессии вы замечаете знакомые фигуры медикариев.{/n}

{n}The members of the procession bow to you, sending heady fumes of machine unguents wafting in your direction. From above, they resemble a rippling lake of metallic limbs and mechadendrites. At the very tail of the procession, you notice the familiar figures of the medicae officers.{/n}

languages.text: {n}列の隊員たちはあなたに頭を下げ、機械油の芳醇な香りをあなたに漂わせます。上から見ると、金属の肢と機械樹の波打つ湖のようですね。列の最後尾には、メディカル・オフィサーの姿が確認できます。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The members of the procession bow to you, sending heady fumes of machine unguents wafting in your direction. From above, they resemble a rippling lake of metallic limbs and mechadendrites. At the very tail of the procession, you notice the familiar figures of the medicae officers.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kafile üyeleri, önünde boyun eğip makine özyağlarının baş döndürücü kokularını sana sunuyor. Yukarıdan bakıldığında metalik uzuvlar ve {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mekadentritlerden{/g} oluşan dalgalı bir gölü andırıyorlar. Kafilenin sonunda, tanıdık sıhhiye subaylarını görüyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The members of the procession bow to you, sending heady fumes of machine unguents wafting in your direction. From above, they resemble a rippling lake of metallic limbs and {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g}. At the very tail of the procession, you notice the familiar figures of the medicae officers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kafile üyeleri, önünde boyun eğip makine özyağlarının baş döndürücü kokularını sana sunuyor. Yukarıdan bakıldığında metalik uzuvlar ve {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mekadentritlerden{/g} oluşan dalgalı bir gölü andırıyorlar. Kafilenin sonunda, tanıdık sıhhiye subaylarını görüyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}队列成员向你鞠躬致敬，浓郁的机油气味扑面而来。从高处望去，他们就像一片由金属义体和机械{g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}触须{/g}组成的涟漪之湖。在队列最末尾，你瞥见了医务官们熟悉的身影。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The members of the procession bow to you, sending heady fumes of machine unguents wafting in your direction. From above, they resemble a rippling lake of metallic limbs and {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g}. At the very tail of the procession, you notice the familiar figures of the medicae officers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}队列成员向你鞠躬致敬，浓郁的机油气味扑面而来。从高处望去，他们就像一片由金属义体和机械{g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}触须{/g}组成的涟漪之湖。在队列最末尾，你瞥见了医务官们熟悉的身影。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Mitglieder der Prozession verbeugen sich vor dir und die berauschenden Dämpfe von Maschinensalben wehen in deine Richtung. Von oben betrachtet erinnern sie an einen aufgewühlten See aus metallischen Gliedmaßen und {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mechadendriten{/g}. Ganz am Ende der Prozession bemerkst du die vertrauten Gestalten der Medicae-Offiziere.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The members of the procession bow to you, sending heady fumes of machine unguents wafting in your direction. From above, they resemble a rippling lake of metallic limbs and {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g}. At the very tail of the procession, you notice the familiar figures of the medicae officers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Mitglieder der Prozession verbeugen sich vor dir und die berauschenden Dämpfe von Maschinensalben wehen in deine Richtung. Von oben betrachtet erinnern sie an einen aufgewühlten See aus metallischen Gliedmaßen und {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}Mechadendriten{/g}. Ganz am Ende der Prozession bemerkst du die vertrauten Gestalten der Medicae-Offiziere.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les membres de la procession s'inclinent devant vous, et les vapeurs entêtantes des onguents mécaniques viennent vous chatouiller les narines. Vu d'en haut, on dirait un lac ondoyant de membres métalliques et autres {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mécadendrites{/g}. Tout au bout de la cohorte, vous repérez les silhouettes familières des officiers de medicae.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The members of the procession bow to you, sending heady fumes of machine unguents wafting in your direction. From above, they resemble a rippling lake of metallic limbs and {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mechadendrites{/g}. At the very tail of the procession, you notice the familiar figures of the medicae officers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les membres de la procession s'inclinent devant vous, et les vapeurs entêtantes des onguents mécaniques viennent vous chatouiller les narines. Vu d'en haut, on dirait un lac ondoyant de membres métalliques et autres {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mécadendrites{/g}. Tout au bout de la cohorte, vous repérez les silhouettes familières des officiers de medicae.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los miembros de la comitiva te dedican una reverencia, enviando los aromáticos vapores de ungüentos para máquinas hacia ti. Desde arriba, parecen un lago ondulante de extremidades metálicas y {g|Encyclopedia:Mechadendrite}mecadendritas{/g}. Al fondo de la procesión notas las figuras de los oficiales de medicae.{/n}

At the very tail of the procession, you notice the familiar figures of the medicae officers.{/n}
